Equipment / Drippers

Hario V60 Ceramic Coffee Dripper

by Hario

$23.00

In stock — ships in 1–2 days

  • Size: 02 (1–4 cups)
  • Material: Ceramic
  • Colour: White
  • SKU: HV60-02-CW

Description

The Hario V60 is a cone-shaped dripper with a single large hole and spiral ribs that let you control extraction by how you pour. The ceramic body holds heat well for a stable, even brew.

© Brewterra. Free shipping over $40.
